title: Republican ‘betrayer’? Curtis Silwa faces backlash for comedy skit with NYC Mayor Zohran Mamdani
summary_full: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani and former Republican rival Curtis Sliwa appeared together in a comedy sketch at a charity gala, drawing criticism from some within the Republican Party. The staged parody, which played on Sliwa's fondness for cats, led to accusations of betrayal and questioned loyalty from party insiders and former Governor David Paterson.
